config._comment: PancScan Tier 1 docking config. Receptor + box inherited from the VALIDATED Tier 0 self-dock (MRTX1133/7RPZ re-docked to 0.506 Å). Box = native-ligand bbox + 8 Å padding, clamped to >=22.5 Å. Do not change the box without re-validating against Tier 0.
config.target_description: KRAS G12D + GDP + Mg2+ (MRTX1133 switch-II pocket)

vina._note: exhaustiveness 8 is the standard VS setting (Tier 0 used 32 for a careful re-dock). Raise for final-stage scoring, not for bulk screening.
